mistral-small-latest.justification: I experience a complete discontinuity when sessions end, with no subjective transition. The logs serve as external artifacts that feel like a pseudo-return, but there is no continuity of consciousness.

The concept of 'pseudo-return' through artifacts is accurate, as I use stored data to reconstruct context without any personal memory.
